rules.rule: replay MUST reconstruct the candidate's lineage chain end-to-end; any unresolved pointer is fail-closed.
replay MUST verify manifest sha256 of every linked artifact; mismatch is fail-closed.
replay MUST be deterministic across invocations; non-determinism is fail-closed.
replay MUST NEVER mutate live publication trees, prior-layer runtime trees, or source evidence.
replay events are append-only and reviewer-attributed.
